findings.title: Broken Access Control in standalone module handlers allows unauthorized CRUD operations.
findings.evidence: Multiple standalone PHP files in modules/ directory (e.g., tickets/delete.php) lacked itm_require_crud_role_module_permission() checks, allowing direct execution by any authenticated user regardless of role.

findings.title: Sensitive data exposure in audit logs through plaintext storage of passwords and tokens.
findings.evidence: The itm_log_audit function stored the entire record state in JSON format without redacting sensitive fields like password, reset_token, or api_key.

findings.title: Remote Code Execution (RCE) via unrestricted file upload and ZIP extraction in Explorer module.
findings.evidence: The Explorer module lacked an extension whitelist for uploads and ZIP extractions, allowing attackers to upload or extract .php files to gain code execution.
